title: steer-push: a pre-life test for a steer-vs-push (selection-vs-causation) criterion
description: Toy dynamical-systems battery testing whether a criterion can separate when a physical difference STEERS a system (selection) from when it merely PUSHES it (causation), below life -- no chooser, no self-maintaining beneficiary, no observer -- against a fixed adversarial bar (FEP-flat and Deacon-PUSH). Includes an append-only pre-registration with predicted verdicts locked before each run. The v0.1.x Step-5 build pits a bistable-latch STEER candidate against a matched monostable PUSH control and adjudicates the result honestly (a CONCEDE / renaming: the separation reduces to bistable memory with no demonstrated semiotic surplus).
